title: Wider Ender Chests
description: Craft new ender chests and unlock additional inventory slots!
body:
![TRIMS EFFECTS BANNER](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Wider_Ender_Chest/MP_WiderEnderChest_header.webp) Say goodbye to space problems! Now, with Wider Ender Chests, you can increase storage space in a fun way, in your favorite versions of Minecraft, and available for Forge, NeoForge and Fabric. ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![WIDER ENDER CHESTS SUMMARY](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Wider_Ender_Chest/MP_WiderEnderChest_description.webp) The functioning is very simple, 8 new Ender chests have been incorporated, each one consisting of a mineral, and adding the following additional space slots. - Iron (+1 row) - Copper (+1 row) - Gold (+2 row) - Lapis Lazuli (+2 row) - Redstone (+2 row) - Diamond (+3 rows) - Emerald (+4 rows) - Netherite (+5 rows) To get the Ender Iron or Copper chests, you will need an Ender chest and surround it with the same mineral. The same with the rest of the chests, for example, to get the Ender Gold chest, you will need a copper or iron Ender chest, and surround it with gold. ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Wider_Ender_Chest/MP_WiderEnderChest_faq.webp) ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this mod be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![SCREENSHOTS](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Wider_Ender_Chest/MP_WiderEnderChest_screenshots.webp) ![screenshots 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/EDVt0J2I/images/dd10b23642dc8cce238b1d621e039fa34cc38b2f.png) ![screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/EDVt0J2I/images/0685e7a49c0cb1da1136e6aaf19b1b0baf1a1878.png) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4)
